plugins.name: ramsify
plugins.description: Redesign a web UI according to Dieter Rams' ten design principles: single accent color, IBM Plex Sans typography, 2px border-radius, no shadows, semantic button classes, icon discipline, and keyboard focus states.

plugins.name: typst-plugin
plugins.description: Auto-compile Typst files via tinymist after every Edit or Write. Provides a PostToolUse hook, tinymist LSP integration (semantic highlighting, go-to-def, hover, formatting), and a skill for compiling, previewing, and formatting Typst documents.
